title: Third assistant district attorney
doc_html:
§459. Third assistant district attorney

           The office of third assistant district attorney is hereby created in and for the Twenty-First Judicial District, under the provisions of Article VII, Section 60 of the Constitution of Louisiana.1

           Added by Acts 1966, No. 236, §1.

1See, now, LSA-Const. Art. 5, §26.
doc_text:
§459.  Third assistant district attorney
The office of third assistant district attorney is hereby created in and for
the Twenty-First Judicial District, under the provisions of Article VII, Section
60 of the Constitution of Louisiana.
1
Added by Acts 1966, No. 236, §1.

See, now, LSA-Const. Art. 5, §26.
